heroBackground.title: Cinematographic Parisian palace facade golden hour

corrections: Top nav translated EN→FR (Recherche, Destinations, Itinéraires, Service Concierge)
Top-right CTA replaced (Join the circle → Demander disponibilité, outline bronze)
Hero gradient strengthened (anthracite 0.20→0.45→0.78) for WCAG AA
generations.note: Stitch applied DOM patches but get_screen still returns the cached pre-edit HTML. To see the corrected state, view on the Stitch web canvas (stitchUrl above) or re-run generate_screen_from_text with corrected prompt.

knownIssues: Stitch caches the screenshot/HTML export. After edit_screens, get_screen returns the pre-edit HTML even though the canvas reflects the patches. Re-generate via generate_screen_from_text for a fresh static export.
